title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw, to Sign for and in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, Laguna a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Provincial Government of Laguna Represented by Honorable Governor Ramil L. Hernandez for the Transfer and Utilization of Funds Relative to the Grant of Covid-19 Special Risk Allowance to Health Workers. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 09/06/2021)
